productDisplayName: Nike Men Man U SS Authentic Grey T-shirt
description: Composition Grey T-shirt for men made of 100% organically grown cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, stitch detailing on the shoulders with graphic and slightly distressed rubber print on the front and nike tag on the left hem Fit Standard Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with the utmost comfort in this authentic manchester united T-shirt from nike. The cotton wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the fashionable graphic and rubber print add style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
